software_item.name: patient-ui
software_item.description: React/TypeScript micro-frontend monorepo providing patient-facing web application for triage interviews, appointments, chat, video consultations, and consent management
software_item.safety_class_rationale: Software that can contribute to hazardous situations but is not the sole cause of harm. Interfaces with clinical decision support (triage), displays clinical information, manages patient appointments and consents, but does not directly control treatment or make autonomous clinical decisions. Failures can lead to delayed care, incorrect patient data, or loss of consent records.

hazard_contributions.description: Authentication token expiry not detected, allowing patient to submit clinical data without valid session
hazard_contributions.cause: JWT token expiry checked only on initAuth, not continuously validated during long-running sessions
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient submits triage responses or consent decisions that are not properly associated with their identity, leading to misdiagnosis or inappropriate treatment

hazard_contributions.description: WebSocket connection loss not detected immediately, patient continues interaction with stale data
hazard_contributions.cause: WebSocket fallback uses polling intervals but may not detect connection loss until next interval, no immediate user notification of connection state
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient provides triage information or receives clinical guidance based on outdated data, leading to delayed or incorrect care decisions

hazard_contributions.description: Error boundary catches errors but does not prevent data loss during triage interview
hazard_contributions.cause: ReactErrorBoundary displays error UI and logs error but interview state may be lost if crash occurs during question answering
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient must restart triage interview, providing inconsistent or contradictory information, leading to incomplete clinical assessment

hazard_contributions.description: Consent status saved without verification of successful persistence
hazard_contributions.cause: saveConsent API call returns but no explicit verification that consent was durably stored, relying on HTTP success status only
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient consent not properly recorded, leading to treatment without valid consent or denial of needed care

hazard_contributions.description: Patient personal data update lacks atomic transaction guarantees
hazard_contributions.cause: updatePatientPersonalData updates date of birth and gender via REST API without transaction scope, partial updates possible on failure
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient demographic data becomes inconsistent (e.g., gender updated but DOB not), leading to clinical decision errors based on incomplete information

hazard_contributions.description: Appointment cancellation does not verify downstream notification success
hazard_contributions.cause: cancelAppointment API call succeeds but no verification that practitioner or care unit was notified of cancellation
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner unaware of cancellation, patient fails to receive care, or care slot remains unfilled when it could be reallocated

hazard_contributions.description: React Query error handling suppresses errors, user not informed of data fetch failures
hazard_contributions.cause: queryClient configured with useErrorBoundary: false and networkMode: offlineFirst, errors shown as toast notifications only which may be dismissed
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient interacts with stale or missing clinical data without awareness, leading to incomplete or incorrect information during consultation

hazard_contributions.description: Universal error shutdown mechanism can be bypassed via session storage manipulation
hazard_contributions.cause: useUniversalErrorShutdown checks sessionStorage which can be edited by patient via browser dev tools
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient bypasses safety shutdown intended to prevent use during critical system failures, leading to continued use of unsafe system state

hazard_contributions.description: Triage referral selection does not validate actionId before submission
hazard_contributions.cause: selectReferral function accepts actionId without validation, submitting directly to backend API
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Invalid triage action submitted, potentially routing patient to inappropriate care level or specialty

hazard_contributions.description: Authorization check can redirect during critical operations
hazard_contributions.cause: useIsAuthorized performs navigation redirect based on isAnonymous flag during useEffect, which may interrupt in-progress operations
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient redirected during triage interview or appointment booking, losing progress and requiring restart with potentially inconsistent data

hazard_contributions.description: Redux state persisted in cookies without encryption
hazard_contributions.cause: Redux-persist configured with cookie storage, authentication and user state stored in browser cookies accessible to JavaScript
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Patient session data exposed to XSS attacks, unauthorized access to patient account and clinical data

hazard_contributions.description: Escalation consent status update does not verify current appointment state
hazard_contributions.cause: saveEscalation updates escalation consent without checking if appointment is in valid state for escalation
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Consent for escalation recorded when appointment is already completed or cancelled, leading to confusion about patient intent

risk_controls_implemented.description: JWT token validation on application initialization
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: initAuth decodes JWT token and checks expiry timestamp against current time, triggers logout if expired
useWebsockets implements setFallbackIntervals to establish polling intervals when WebSocket connection is lost

risk_controls_implemented.description: Global error boundary with analytics reporting
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: ReactErrorBoundary catches unhandled errors, logs to analytics with stack trace, displays error UI with event ID for support
queryClient configured with onError callback that displays toast notification for all failed queries and mutations
lockRequireAuthorizationRedirects flag prevents multiple simultaneous redirects during logout/login flows

risk_controls_implemented.description: Patient ID validation before personal data update
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: updatePatientPersonalData throws error if id parameter is missing before making API call

risk_controls_implemented.description: Authorization header injection for all API requests
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: registerAuth adds Axios interceptor that injects Bearer token into Authorization header for all requests

risk_controls_implemented.description: Consent merge prioritizes pending consents over registered
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: mergeConsentsAndPendingConsents ensures pending (newly required) consents override registered consents to prevent stale consent data

risk_controls_implemented.description: History back disabled during authorization redirects
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: RequireAuth sets HistoryBackMonitor disabled state when shouldRedirect is true, preventing navigation confusion
logout function clears all visible toast notifications to prevent stale messages from previous session

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend API must validate triage action IDs before processing
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot reliably validate action IDs without duplicating triage engine logic; validation must be authoritative at backend

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must implement transactional updates for patient personal data
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot control database transaction boundaries across REST API; atomicity must be guaranteed by backend

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must verify consent persistence and return confirmation
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot directly access consent database to verify storage; backend must confirm durable write

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must implement webhook or message queue for appointment cancellation notifications
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot directly notify practitioners or care units; notification infrastructure must exist at system level

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Infrastructure must enforce HTTPS with secure cookies and HSTS
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot control transport security; TLS and cookie security attributes must be enforced by infrastructure

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must implement content security policy to prevent XSS
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot protect against XSS without server-side CSP headers; browser security controls must be configured at infrastructure level

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: System must monitor and alert on universal error shutdown activations
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend can trigger shutdown but cannot monitor trends or coordinate across multiple patient sessions; system-level monitoring required

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Patient training on recognizing disconnection and error states
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software cannot force user attention or comprehension; user training and documentation required

failure_modes.name: React component unhandled exception
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Component tree unmounts, error boundary catches and displays error UI, application state may be partially lost
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient session interrupted, may need to restart interview or booking flow, data loss possible if not persisted
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: ReactErrorBoundary catches error, logs to analytics platform with stack trace and event ID
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: User must reload page or navigate to home, session state recovered from Redux Persist if available

failure_modes.name: WebSocket connection timeout
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Real-time updates cease, TOPICS.DISCONNECTED event fired, fallback polling intervals established
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient receives delayed updates on appointment status, chat messages, or triage progress
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: WebSocket onclose event, wasClean flag indicates clean vs unclean disconnect
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Automatic fallback to HTTP polling with configurable interval, reconnection attempted on TOPICS.CONNECTED

failure_modes.name: API request timeout or network error
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Query/mutation fails, onError callback triggered, toast notification displayed to user
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient action (booking, consent, triage submission) fails, data not persisted to backend
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Axios error interceptor, React Query error handlers, network error codes
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: User must manually retry operation, no automatic retry configured (retry: false)

failure_modes.name: JWT token expiry during active session
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: API requests begin failing with 401 Unauthorized, logout triggered, user redirected to login
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient session terminated, must re-authenticate to continue, in-progress operations lost
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Token expiry check in initAuth, 401 responses from backend API
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Automatic logout and redirect to login page, session state cleared, anonymous token obtained

failure_modes.name: Redux state hydration failure from persisted storage
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Application state not restored, user appears logged out, preferences lost
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient must re-authenticate and re-enter preferences, previous session context lost
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Redux persist error callbacks, console logging
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Application starts with initial state, user must re-authenticate

failure_modes.name: Browser local/session storage quota exceeded
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: State persistence fails, writes to sessionStorage throw QuotaExceededError
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient session state not persisted, refresh causes data loss, shutdown flags may not be stored
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: JavaScript exception on storage write operations
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: No automatic recovery, user must clear browser storage or use different browser

failure_modes.name: Axios request interceptor failure
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Authorization header not added to request, or request interceptor throws exception
failure_modes.effect_on_system: API requests fail authentication, all patient operations fail, 401 errors cascade
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Axios interceptor error callback, API 401 responses
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Error rejected via Promise.reject, higher level error handlers attempt recovery

failure_modes.name: Consent API returns success but data not persisted
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: HTTP 200 response received, UI indicates success, but backend database write failed
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient believes consent is recorded but system has no record, potential consent violation
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Backend must detect persistence failure, but currently no verification in frontend
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: No automatic recovery, relies on backend transaction integrity and error responses

failure_modes.name: Triage interview state lost during navigation
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: User navigates away or browser crash loses Redux state before persistence
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient must restart triage interview, potentially providing different answers, clinical assessment incomplete
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Redux state monitoring, persistence layer monitoring
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Redux Persist attempts to restore state, but timing window exists before initial persistence

failure_modes.name: Infinite redirect loop during authorization
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Redirect logic triggers repeatedly, browser eventually stops with 'too many redirects' error
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot access application, stuck in login loop, service unavailable
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: lockRequireAuthorizationRedirects prevents most cases, but manual browser storage clear may be required

failure_modes.name: Bundle loading failure (chunk load error)
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: JavaScript bundle fails to load, module import throws error, page render fails
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot access specific features (chat, video, appointments), partial application failure
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Browser console errors, network request failures, ErrorBoundary if during render
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: webpack-retry-chunk-load-plugin attempts retry, but persistent failures require page reload

failure_modes.name: React Query cache corruption
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Cached data becomes stale or inconsistent with backend, user sees outdated information
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient views incorrect appointment times, outdated consent status, or stale triage results
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: StaleDataErrorBoundary for specific domains, manual user refresh required otherwise
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: refetchOnWindowFocus: false prevents automatic refresh, user must manually reload

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Appointment data (booking, cancellation, updates) critical for patient care continuity. Failure prevents booking or cancelling appointments, leading to missed care or resource waste.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Axios error interceptor catches HTTP errors, React Query onError displays toast notification, no automatic retry, user must manually retry operation

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Consent data critical for legal compliance and treatment authorization. Failure to save or retrieve consent can lead to treatment without authorization or denial of needed care.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Axios error interceptor, React Query error notification, no retry, user must manually retry consent acceptance/decline

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Triage action selection determines care pathway and urgency. Failure to submit or incorrect action ID can route patient to inappropriate care level (e.g., self-care when emergency needed).
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Axios error interceptor, no retry, user sees error notification but may not understand clinical implications

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Patient demographic data (date of birth, gender) used for clinical decision support. Incorrect data can lead to inappropriate treatment (e.g., gender-specific conditions, age-based dosing).
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: updatePatientPersonalData throws error if id missing, Axios error handling for API failures, partial update possible if connection lost mid-operation

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Real-time updates for chat messages, appointment status changes, triage progress. Failure delays critical information (e.g., appointment cancelled, urgent message from practitioner).
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Automatic fallback to HTTP polling with configurable interval, connectionWasLost flag triggers fallback callbacks, reconnection attempted when connection restored

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Error logging and event tracking for safety monitoring. If analytics unavailable, error events may not be logged, preventing detection of systematic failures.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: logError and sendEventV2 failures caught but not critical, analytics errors do not block user operations

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Clinical notes from practitioners displayed to patient. Missing or stale notes can lead to patient non-compliance with treatment instructions.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: React Query error handling, no retry, patient sees error notification or empty notes section

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Exit actions contain post-appointment instructions (prescriptions, follow-ups, referrals). Failure to retrieve can lead to patient missing critical follow-up care.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Axios error handling, no retry, patient may see no exit actions or error message

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Stores session state, authentication tokens, user preferences, shutdown flags. Failure affects session persistence and safety controls.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: QuotaExceededError on write, no automatic handling, application may fail to persist critical state

interfaces_with_safety_impact.interface: CDN for Platform24 design system and MFE components
interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Design system components and micro-frontends loaded from external CDN. Failure prevents rendering of critical UI components.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Browser network layer handles failures, webpack-retry-chunk-load-plugin retries failed chunk loads, but persistent CDN outage blocks functionality

verification_gaps.description: WebSocket fallback mechanism not covered by unit tests
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests for useWebsockets hook covering connection loss scenarios, fallback interval establishment, and reconnection logic

verification_gaps.description: Authorization header injection not verified in tests
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests verifying Authorization header is correctly added to all authenticated API requests

verification_gaps.description: Patient personal data update validation not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests for updatePatientPersonalData error cases (missing id, API failures, partial updates)

verification_gaps.description: Triage referral selection API integration not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests for selectReferral covering valid and invalid actionId scenarios, verify backend validation
Add unit tests for mergeConsentsAndPendingConsents verifying pending consents correctly override registered consents

verification_gaps.description: Token expiry during active operations not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add end-to-end tests simulating token expiry during triage interview, appointment booking, and consent submission

verification_gaps.description: Redux Persist hydration failures not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests for Redux Persist error scenarios (corrupted storage, quota exceeded, version migration failures)

verification_gaps.description: API timeout and network failure scenarios not systematically tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add systematic integration tests for all critical APIs covering timeout, network error, and partial response scenarios

verification_gaps.description: Universal error shutdown mechanism not tested for bypass scenarios
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests verifying shutdown cannot be easily bypassed via sessionStorage manipulation, consider server-side shutdown enforcement

verification_gaps.description: Infinite redirect loop prevention not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests verifying lockRequireAuthorizationRedirects prevents redirect loops in edge cases (concurrent logouts, expired tokens during navigation)

verification_gaps.description: Only 52 test files for 671+ TypeScript source files (7.7% coverage)
verification_gaps.recommendation: Establish systematic unit testing for all safety-critical modules (authentication, consent, triage, appointments, patient data) with target 80%+ coverage for safety-relevant code

verification_gaps.description: WebSocket reconnection and state synchronization not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests for WebSocket disconnect/reconnect scenarios, verify no data loss or state inconsistency during connection interruption

shared_hazards: Authentication token expiry (shared with practitioner-ui, clinic-ui)
WebSocket connection loss (shared with all real-time components)
API timeout and network errors (shared with all backend-dependent items)
Data persistence failures (shared with all items using backend storage)
Consent management errors (potentially shared with clinic-ui for verification)
system_level_controls_needed: End-to-end encryption for patient data in transit and at rest
Audit logging of all consent decisions and triage submissions
Real-time monitoring of API failure rates and WebSocket connection health
Automated alerting for universal error shutdown activations
Systematic backup and recovery for patient session state
Content Security Policy enforcement at infrastructure level
Rate limiting and DDoS protection for patient-facing endpoints
